Home → Discography → Speaking in Tongues

Speaking in Tongues

2005 · SMC Recordings

Named after a notorious 2005 incident where Bizzy Bone broke into a spiritual rant live on Houston radio station KPFT FM. Critics praised the album's gritty lo-fi recording quality and Bizzy's spiritually unhinged lyricism. One of his most raw and personal solo efforts, dealing with addiction, faith and redemption.

"Ain't no illusion less than God, for the realest of the writin, Love thy neighbor, it's way beyond the fightin and the lightnin."

— Less Fame
01 What U See produced by Studio Kat ▷
02 T.T. (Trickery & Treachery) produced by Quite Stankable Productions ▷
03 Bald Head Horse Man produced by Quite Stankable Productions ▷
04 Seeing Things produced by Eddie B ▷
05 BB Da Thug produced by Eddie B ▷
06 Beauty (You Just A Rose) produced by Eddie B ▷
07 Carry My Baby produced by Eddie B ▷
08 Hold Me Down produced by Quite Stankable Productions feat. Bambino ▷
09 He Told Me produced by Eddie B feat. Kahnma ▷
10 Represent Da One produced by Eddie B ▷
11 Less Fame produced by Quite Stankable Productions ▷
12 Shake Ya Stick produced by Quite Stankable Productions —
13 All Good produced by Quite Stankable Productions ▷
